title.en: Connection Reset by Peer: TCP RST, Connection Lifecycle, and Engineering Troubleshooting
title.zh: Connection reset by peer：TCP RST、连接生命周期与工程排查体系研究

summary.en: A systematic explanation of Connection reset by peer, TCP RST semantics, lifecycle timing, common production causes, and practical troubleshooting methods for long-lived network connections.
summary.zh: 系统解释 Connection reset by peer 与 TCP RST 的协议语义、生命周期位置、常见工程根因和排查治理方法。

readingDirection.en: Read this when diagnosing connection resets, long-connection disconnects, stale connection-pool reuse, idle timeouts, or registry watch failures.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在排查连接重置、长连接断开、连接池复用失败、idle timeout 或注册中心 watch 异常时阅读。
